fields.System.Title: User can sign in with email and password
fields.System.Description:
As a registered user,
I want to sign in with my email and password,
so that I can access my account and continue where I left off.
fields.Microsoft.VSTS.Common.AcceptanceCriteria:
1. Given valid credentials, when I submit the login form, then I am redirected to /dashboard within 2 seconds.
  2. Given invalid credentials, the form shows the error "Invalid email or password" and does not navigate away.
  3. POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 200 with a signed JWT in the response body for valid credentials, and 401 with an error code for invalid credentials.
  4. After 5 consecutive failed login attempts within a 10-minute window, the account is locked and the API returns 423 Locked until an admin unlocks it.
  5. The login button is disabled while a request is in flight, to prevent duplicate submissions.
  6. The email field validates basic email shape on blur; the password field is masked by default with a show/hide toggle.
